summary: Bug Fix Testing - 100% PASS. Both critical bugs fixed: 1) linkSuggestion ReferenceError in POST /api/orders - FIXED (variable moved outside transaction), 2) ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS enum missing in PATCH /api/orders/:id/payment-status - FIXED (enum added to PostgreSQL). All 16 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: linkSuggestion variable declared at line 55 OUTSIDE transaction (line 56) - no more ReferenceError
VERIFIED: ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS enum in auditLog.js model at line 26 - includes both new values
VERIFIED: CONFIRM_LINK action in auditLog.js enum at line 26 - working correctly
VERIFIED: togglePaymentStatus (line 701) creates audit log with action 'ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS' at line 928
VERIFIED: confirmLink (line 975) creates audit log with action 'CONFIRM_LINK' at line 1007
VERIFIED: Audit logs contain oldValues/newValues with paymentStatus, paidAmount, dueAmount
seed_data_creation: Created orders INV/2025-26/1716 through INV/2025-26/1728 during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified working. ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS and CONFIRM_LINK enum values now in PostgreSQL. linkSuggestion logic returns suggestion only when customerName matches existing customer AND no customerId provided. customerId is intentionally NOT allowed in POST /api/orders - use POST /api/orders/:id/confirm-link instead.

PASSED: POST /api/orders - returns linkSuggestion when customerName matches existing customer
POST /api/orders - creates new customer when name doesn't match
Audit log oldValues contains: paymentStatus, paidAmount, dueAmount
Audit log newValues contains: paymentStatus, paidAmount, dueAmount
Order validation - items require name field
Payment toggle validation - requires changedBy for audit trail

bug_1_linkSuggestion_ReferenceError.root_cause: Variable declared inside transaction scope, accessed outside
bug_1_linkSuggestion_ReferenceError.fix: Moved 'let linkSuggestion = null' to line 55, before transaction at line 56
bug_1_linkSuggestion_ReferenceError.verification: Created 13 orders during testing - no crash

bug_2_ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS_enum_missing.root_cause: PostgreSQL enum type 'enum_audit_logs_action' missing ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS and CONFIRM_LINK values
bug_2_ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS_enum_missing.fix: ALTER TYPE enum_audit_logs_action ADD VALUE for both new values + Sequelize model updated
bug_2_ORDER_PAYMENT_STATUS_enum_missing.verification: Toggled payment status multiple times - audit logs created successfully
